passives.name: Acrobat
passives.description: Increases your experience gain with the Bow skill line by 15%. Decreases your fall damage taken by 10%.

passives.name: Hunter's Eye
passives.description: Increases your Stealth Detection radius by 3 meters. Increases your Movement Speed by 5% and your Physical and Spell Penetration by 950.

passives.name: Resist Affliction
passives.description: Increases your Max Stamina by 2000 and your Disease and Poison Resistance by 2310.
